JPG · PNG · WebP · max 5MB
File di /opt/thumbnails (0)
Belum ada thumbnail.
Flow thumbnail:
1. Upload dari sini → langsung ke /opt/thumbnails di VPS
2. rclone otomatis push ke Google Drive gdrive:thumbnails
3. Pilih thumbnail di Config panel channel di halaman Streams
